message:
fix: update dependencies to resolve security advisories

Resolves RUSTSEC-2026-0044 (aws-lc-sys X.509 Name Constraints Bypass),
RUSTSEC-2026-0045 (aws-lc-sys AES-CCM Timing Side-Channel), and
RUSTSEC-2026-0048 (aws-lc-sys CRL Distribution Point Scope Check).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
